title: T-004 — maintenance_work_orders + mwo_checklists + mwo_loto_checklists DDL + RLS (13-c, MNT §9.5-9.7)
prompt:
# T-004 — MWO core tables (state machine, checklists, LOTO)

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §9.5, §9.6, §9.7, §8.2 (mwo_state_machine_v1), §11.1, §14.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 3 core MWO tables: `maintenance_work_orders` (6-state), `mwo_checklists` (per-step), `mwo_loto_checklists` (LOTO pre-execution). RLS via `app.current_org_id()`+`site_user_access`. State machine values match `mwo_state_machine_v1` per PRD §8.2; transition enforcement lives in T-010 Server Action, not DB triggers (workflow-as-data).

## Pre-flight
Verify (a) latest migration #, (b) `equipment` and `maintenance_schedules` exist (T-002/T-003), (c) `auth.users` and `app.current_org_id()` from Wave1 T-125, (d) `downtime_events` table in 08-production — if not yet present, `downtime_event_id` is plain UUID with no FK and a comment that 08-production T-035..T-040 add the FK constraint.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_c_mwo.sql` with CREATE TABLE for all three tables per PRD §9.5/9.6/9.7 DDL.
2. `state CHECK IN ('requested','approved','open','in_progress','completed','cancelled')` (6-state per D-MNT-9).
3. `source CHECK IN ('manual_request','auto_downtime','pm_schedule','oee_trigger','calibration_alert')`.
4. `type CHECK IN ('reactive','preventive','calibration','sanitation','inspection')`.
5. `priority CHECK IN ('low','medium','high','critical')`.
6. `mwo_number TEXT NOT NULL` + `UNIQUE(org_id, mwo_number)`.
7. R13 audit cols on all three tables.
8. RLS+FORCE RLS via `app.current_org_id()` + site_user_access (read scope follows §14.2: technician sees own assigned + shared read; full scoping helpers live in T-008 Server Actions).
9. Indexes: idx_mwo_state, idx_mwo_equipment, idx_mwo_assigned, idx_mwo_source, idx_mwo_org_site.
10. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/work-orders.ts`.
11. Vitest: CHECK constraint enforcement (insert with invalid state/source/type/priority fails); RLS isolation between orgs; FORCE RLS; unique mwo_number per org.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_c_mwo.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/work-orders.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/maintenance-c-mwo.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when the three tables are inspected, then `state`/`source`/`type`/`priority` CHECK constraints, `UNIQUE(org_id, mwo_number)`, FK to equipment+schedules+technicians, R13 audit cols, RLS+FORCE RLS are present.
2. Given an INSERT with state='unknown', when executed, then it fails with CHECK violation; same for invalid source/type/priority.
3. Given two orgs via `app.set_org_context`, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds.
4. Given two MWOs with same `mwo_number` in different orgs, when both insert, then both succeed (UNIQUE is per-org).

## Test strategy
- RED: maintenance-c-mwo.test.ts asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-c-mwo`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not encode state transitions in DB triggers — they belong to DSL rule `mwo_state_machine_v1` enforced by T-010 Server Action (workflow-as-data per Foundation §7).
- Do not name business column tenant_id; org_id only.
- Do not read current_setting() GUC; use app.current_org_id().
- Do not add CASCADE DELETE on equipment FK (preserve audit trail).
- Do not add an FK to 08-production downtime_events if that table is absent; comment the future FK and revisit when 08-production T-035 lands.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create maintenance_work_orders + mwo_checklists + mwo_loto_checklists with 6-state CHECK, FK to equipment/schedules/technicians, R13, RLS via app.current_org_id().
pipeline_inputs.details: Core MWO + dependent step/LOTO tables. State transitions enforced in T-010 Server Action against mwo_state_machine_v1 DSL rule (workflow-as-data). downtime_event_id is UUID with no FK if 08-production has not yet emitted the table. LOTO sign-off uses @monopilot/e-sign foundation primitive (T-124) — signEvent/dualSign with replay nonce + paired audit (retention='security'). Outbox publication of mwo.*/downtime.* events uses foundation T-112 outbox primitive so 15-OEE MTBF/MTTR consumers receive them.

Given INSERT with state='unknown', when executed, then it fails with CHECK violation; same for invalid source/type/priority
Given two orgs via app.set_org_context, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds
Given two MWOs with same mwo_number in different orgs, when both insert, then both succeed (UNIQUE is per-org)

Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-c-mwo`
